package rulecoverage

func NegativeMultipleBindSourcesIntoSameStructWithoutPrecedenceContract() string {
    ruleID := "multiple_bind_sources_into_same_struct_without_precedence_contract"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "One DTO being filled from body, query, and path without a clear precedence policy."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
